description: Logical contract for TranscriptAggregatorExtractor.features_flat. Reads chunk .npy from TranscriptChunkEmbedder; writes transcript_*_agg_*.npy.

tp_tragg_whisper_n_chunks.description: NaN when emit_extra_metrics=false; *_mean_std/_max_std also NaN when compute_std=false

tp_tragg_youtube_auto_n_chunks.description: NaN when emit_extra_metrics=false; *_mean_std/_max_std also NaN when compute_std=false

tp_tragg_combined_n_chunks.description: NaN when emit_extra_metrics=false; *_mean_std/_max_std also NaN when compute_std=false

tp_tragg_whisper_mean_std.description: NaN when emit_extra_metrics=false; *_mean_std/_max_std also NaN when compute_std=false

tp_tragg_whisper_max_std.description: NaN when emit_extra_metrics=false; *_mean_std/_max_std also NaN when compute_std=false

tp_tragg_youtube_auto_mean_std.description: NaN when emit_extra_metrics=false; *_mean_std/_max_std also NaN when compute_std=false

tp_tragg_youtube_auto_max_std.description: NaN when emit_extra_metrics=false; *_mean_std/_max_std also NaN when compute_std=false

tp_tragg_combined_mean_std.description: NaN when emit_extra_metrics=false; *_mean_std/_max_std also NaN when compute_std=false

tp_tragg_combined_max_std.description: NaN when emit_extra_metrics=false; *_mean_std/_max_std also NaN when compute_std=false
